concerns.text: FR-008 mandates a sensitivity analysis on 'proportional density (±5%)' for structural network thresholding. Phase 6 (T035-T039) replaces this with a 'tractography confidence threshold' analysis. These are distinct parameters (graph sparsity vs. edge reliability). The required density sweep task is missing.

Plan.md (Independence Enforcement) and Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) require using real HCP data without modification. Task T035 proposes 'simulated noise injection' into the structural pipeline. This violates the plan's constraint to use only real data and introduces synthetic data not covered by the spec.

SC-002 requires measuring robustness by calculating the 'absolute difference in correlation coefficients' between 30 TR and 20 TR windows. Task T033 (report generation) only mandates 'sensitivity tables' without explicitly requiring the output of this specific numerical difference metric.

FR-002 and Plan.md require 'Leave-One-Out (LOO) K-Means' where centroids are derived from N-1 subjects. Task T016 description ('Implement LOO K-Means...') lacks explicit detail on the iterative N-1 exclusion logic, risking a naive implementation that concatenates all subjects (violating the independence mechanism).
